headline: Assessing Fidelity National Information Services (FIS) After Prolonged Share Price Weakness
summary: If you are wondering whether Fidelity National Information Services is currently priced attractively or not, it helps to first frame how the market has been treating the stock recently. The share price closed at US$50.08, with returns of 2.1% over the last 7 days, a 10.7% decline over 30 days, a 23.7% decline year to date, and a 26.5% decline over 1 year. The 3 year and 5 year returns sit at 14.0% and 61.5% declines respectively. These moves have arrived alongside ongoing attention on the...

headline: After Scouting The S&P 500 For 5-Year Losers, These 5 Stocks Stood Out As Possible Winners
